365.issue_title: Remove validate_dto and create_file tools from MCP server

cycles.name: C1 — Delete tools and clean up tests
cycles.goal: Remove ValidateDTOTool, ValidateDTOInput, CreateFileTool, CreateFileInput from production and server registration. Clean up all affected test files. Verify correctness via green test suite.
deliverables: D1.3: mcp_server/server.py — CreateFileTool and ValidateDTOTool imports and registrations removed
D1.7: tests/mcp_server/unit/tools/test_extra_forbid.py — CreateFileInput and ValidateDTOInput imports and parametrize entries removed
D1.8: tests/mcp_server/unit/integration/test_all_tools.py — all references to both tools removed
D1.9: tests/mcp_server/tools/test_c4_description_invariants.py — ValidateDTOTool import and description invariant removed
D1.10: tests/mcp_server/integration/test_pr_status_lockdown.py — CreateFileTool import and parametrize entry removed
cycles.exit_criteria: Full test suite passes (pytest). Quality gates pass (scope=branch) on all modified files. No import of ValidateDTOTool, ValidateDTOInput, CreateFileTool, or CreateFileInput remains in any non-archive file. SafeEditTool remains in test_pr_status_lockdown.py parametrize list.
